summary: Full hippocampus memory system v1.7 implemented: 8 Python source modules (config/types/graph/embedding/retrieval/consolidation/memory_system) totaling ~97KB, plus 22KB test suite and 6KB README. Complete coverage of all spec sections §1-§4 with all formulas implemented exactly per spec.

42+ test cases across 16 test classes covering all components: vector ops, graph CRUD (multi-edge), chitchat gate, retrieval (cold start v1.7, RWR, seed selection, refinement penalty), consolidation (4-branch edge decision tree, bias drift, triangular closure, L3 quantile normalization, time decay, UNK damping merge, redlist lazy rollback), full closed-loop. Formula verification done manually due to bwrap shell environment issues. All 8 key equations from spec matched exactly.
